title: The Pad (and How to Use It)
writer: Thomas C. Ryan, Peter Shaffer, Ben Starr
actors: Brian Bedford, Julie Sommars, James Farentino
plot: Shy bachelor Bob asks his best friend Ted to keep him company during his first date in his pad with the girl he met at a classical concert and fell in love with. However, Ted also likes her and the date goes terribly wrong for Bob.
